member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer
member.summary: Base class for colorization implementations. The colorization can be run during the actual calculation (using only the iteration count and escaping z value) or after the calculation (with the possibiilty to do statistics over all iterated pixels).

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.BlackAndWhite
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and for pixels outside of the set.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.IterationRatioColorizer
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and a hue for the color of pixels outside of the set depending on the ratio of iterations needed to escape to the maximum iteration count. The escaping magnitude is also used for fine tuning.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.IterationModuloColorizer
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and the number of iterations needed to escape as the hue angle degrees for the color of pixels outside of the set. The escaping magnitude is also used for fine tuning.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.SetColor
member.summary: Gets the color to use for pixels inside the set.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.#ctor(System.Boolean)
M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.Initialize(System.Drawing.Size,MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is called by the when calculation starts. Override this method to initialize your colorizer with the given , and . To keep your colorizer thread and usage safe, return your state and it will be provided as parameter to the other colorization methods.
member.param: The scope in the complex plane that is analyzed.
The maximum number of iterations used by the .
member.returns: A state object that is passed on to colorization methods. It is recommended to use this way to pass state instead of keeping shared fields in your colorizer.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.Initialize(MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint[],System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called by the when calculation has finished to initialize post calculation colorization. It is only called if this colorizer was created with set to true. Override this method to initialize your colorizer using the calculation result given in . To pass your analysis result on to the method, return it as state object from this method.
member.param: The result of the calculation. The array's size depends on the of the resolution parameter of the earlier called method. An elements index is row*width+column. See for details about the per pixel information.
The state object returned by the earlier called method.
member.returns: A state object that is passed on to . It is recommended to use this way to pass state instead of keeping shared fields in your colorizer.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.GetColor(System.Drawing.Point,MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called by the to determine the color of an calculated pixel. The calculation result is stored in . See for details about information.
member.param: The raster pixel that should be colorized.
The result of the calculation for this pixel. See for details about the per pixel information
The state object returned by the earlier called or method..
member.returns: The color to use for the given pixel.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.ConvertHsvToRgb(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts a hsv color information into a .
member.param: The hue of the color (0 to 360 degree).
The saturation of the color (0 to 1).
The value (intensity) of the color (0 to 1).
member.returns: The representing the hsv color values.

member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint
member.summary: Represents the element in the sequence z[n+1] = z[n]*z[n] + c of a given number c and z[0] = 0 after iterations.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.C
member.summary: The seed of the sequence. This is the point in the complex plane for which the sequence's behaviour determines wether it belongs to the Mandelbrot set or not.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Z
member.summary: The result of the iterations. This is the th element in the sequence. If its is greater than 2, the sequence diverges and does not belong to the Mandelbrot set. If it is less than or equal to 2, the sequence did not escape after iterations.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Set
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates wether belongs to the Mandelbrot set. If the of is greater than 2, does not belong to the set and false is returned. If it is less than or equal to 2, is assumed to belong to the set and true is returned.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Iterations
member.summary: The number of iterations calculated to this point.
